prompt: Ultra-realistic lifestyle photography featuring two stylish young women captured in multiple candid travel and friendship moments across modern urban and cultural locations. One has a short light-brown bob haircut with soft bangs, while the other has long straight black hair (or tied-back variations). Their facial features remain consistent across every image. They wear trendy Korean/Japanese street fashion with oversized hoodies, varsity sweatshirts, pleated skirts, cargo pants, denim, sneakers, crossbody bags, layered jewelry, sunglasses, and headphones. Natural smiles, relaxed body language, playful interactions such as peace signs, heart hands, pointing toward landmarks, sitting together, and walking side by side. Scenes include: a contemporary bookstore with towering bookshelves, a traditional Korean hanok street at golden hour, a rainy city crosswalk with mountains and a historic palace in the background, and a peaceful green park with wooden benches. Shot at eye level and slightly low-angle perspectives using a 35mm lens, full-body framing, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, authentic environmental storytelling, soft natural daylight, realistic skin texture, highly detailed clothing fabrics, crisp facial details, vibrant yet natural color grading, editorial travel photography, social media influencer aesthetic, ultra-photorealistic, DSLR quality, HDR, 8K, sharp focus, no distortion, no extra limbs, no duplicated people, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic lifestyle photography featuring two stylish young women captured in multiple candid travel and friendship moments across modern urban and cultural locations. One has a short light-brown bob haircut with soft bangs, while the other has long straight black hair (or tied-back variations). Their facial features remain consistent across every image. promptZh: 超写实生活方式摄影，主角为 两位时尚的年轻女性，捕捉她们在现代城市和文化地标中旅行与友谊的多个抓拍瞬间。其中一人留着浅棕色短波波头，带有柔和的刘海；另一人留着黑色长直发（或扎起发型的变体）。她们的面部特征在每张图像中保持一致。她们身着 潮流韩系/日系街头服饰，搭配廓形连帽衫、棒球衫、百褶裙、工装裤、牛仔单品、运动鞋、斜挎包、叠戴首饰、太阳镜和耳机。自然的微笑，放松的肢体语言，俏皮的互动，如比耶、比心、指向地标、并肩而坐或行走。场景包括：拥有高耸书架的现代书店、黄金时刻的韩国传统韩屋街道、背景中有山脉和历史宫殿的雨天城市人行横道，以及带有木质长椅的宁静绿色公园。采用 35mm 镜头，以平视和微仰视角拍摄，全身构图，电影级构图，浅景深，真实的叙事环境，柔和的自然日光，逼真的皮肤纹理，高度细腻的衣物面料，清晰的面部细节，明亮而自然的色彩分级，杂志级旅行摄影风格，社交媒体网红美学，超写实，单反画质，HDR，8K，清晰对焦，无畸变，无多余肢体，无重复人物，无文字，无水印。
